title: apollo THE HOUSEWARES BRAND Cotton Oven Mitt, Hand-made 100% Cotton, Heat Resistant Oven Gloves Non-Slip Kitchen Mitts for Grilling, Cooking, Baking, White, Hearts
features: STYLISH YET PRACTICAL: Add a touch of elegance and practicality to your kitchen with this oven mitt from Apollo Housewares. Made from hand-made cotton, these gloves are designed to protect your hands from hot surfaces while cooking, baking, or grilling. With their soft and comfortable design, these gloves offer a secure grip and allow you to handle hot dishes with ease.

HAND-MADE MATERIAL: This product is hand-made from premium 100% cotton fabric, carefully selected for its softness, durability, and luxurious feel. Unlike synthetic materials, our cotton fabric is natural, breathable, absorbent and built to last. Experience the comfort and quality of our hand-made cotton products, available in various colours.
Available in various colours and patterns.
EASY TO CLEAN: Machine-washable per instructions on the tag, resists wrinkles and shrinkage. Tumble-drying is not recommended.
This product is made in India.
